summary: ANDROID | FMD - When app open for first time dialog for 'Data collection' is constantly appearing after clicking on device card
scenario: Data Collection dialog reappears when tapping device card on FMD screen after selecting "Don't Allow" for location during onboarding
description_clean: When the app is opened for the first time with a device connected, during onboarding if "Don't Allow" is selected for location, the "Data Collection" dialog keeps reappearing after clicking on the device card on the FMD screen. The dialog should be dismissed and the device card should open instead.
steps: 1. Ensure the Poly Studio Mobile app is freshly installed (or data cleared) and a Poly Bluetooth audio device is connected.
2. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app for the first time to trigger onboarding.
3. During onboarding, when prompted for Location permission, select "Don't Allow".
4. After onboarding completes, observe the Home screen (FMD - Find My Device screen).
5. Tap on the device card displayed on the Home screen.
6. Observe whether the "Data Collection" dialog reappears or the device card opens.
expected: The "Data Collection" dialog should be dismissed, and tapping the device card should open the Device Settings screen for the connected device.
actual: The "Data Collection" dialog keeps reappearing after tapping the device card, preventing the user from accessing Device Settings.
